name: Green Beans, Potatoes and Bacon
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Pound Green Beans (about 2 Cups), Cut into 1-inch Pieces
4 Small New Potatoes, Scrubbed and Cut into 8
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine water, green beans, potatoes, and 1 teaspoon salt.
2. Heat over medium-high heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10 to 12 minutes or until tender.
4. Drain the vegetables and set aside.
5. In a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat, cook bacon and onion until the bacon is crisp and the onion is tender.
6. Remove all but 1 tablespoon of the bacon drippings.
7. Add the beans and potatoes to the skillet and toss until well coated with the bacon and onion.
8. Sprinkle with the remaining 1/2 teaspoon salt and pepper.
9. Serve.
